props.copy: Comprehensive electrical contracting services for industrial, commercial, retail, and healthcare facilities

cards.title: Design-Build Services
cards.description: Collaborative approach from concept through completion. Our design-build team works with architects and engineers to deliver cost-effective electrical solutions.

cards.title: New Construction
cards.description: Complete electrical installations for ground-up construction projects. We handle everything from power distribution to lighting and control systems.

cards.title: Retrofit & Renovation
cards.description: Modernize existing facilities with updated electrical systems. We specialize in live building retrofits with minimal disruption to operations.

cards.title: Energy Management
cards.description: LED lighting upgrades, energy audits, and smart building controls to reduce operating costs and improve sustainability.

cards.title: Low Voltage Systems
cards.description: Structured cabling, fiber optics, security systems, access control, CCTV, and audio/visual installations.

cards.title: Power Quality & UPS
cards.description: Uninterruptible power supply systems, surge protection, harmonic filtering, and power factor correction for sensitive equipment.

cards.title: Emergency Power
cards.description: Generator installations, automatic transfer switches, and critical power distribution for hospitals, data centers, and essential facilities.

cards.title: Preventive Maintenance
cards.description: Scheduled maintenance programs, infrared thermography, circuit breaker testing, and comprehensive facility inspections.

cards.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
cards.description: Round-the-clock emergency response for critical electrical issues. Our service technicians are available whenever you need them.

cards.title: Pre-Construction Planning
cards.description: Value engineering, constructability reviews, and electrical system design consultation to optimize project outcomes.

cards.title: Industrial Controls
cards.description: Motor control centers, variable frequency drives, programmable logic controllers, and SCADA system integration.

cards.title: Data Center Infrastructure
cards.description: Specialized electrical systems for mission-critical facilities including redundant power distribution and precision cooling support.
